name: Verifica_EdicionSolServicios
wl_code:
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 13, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado13 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 14, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado14 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 15, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado15 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 16, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado16 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 17, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado17 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 18, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado18 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 19, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado19 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 20, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado20 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 16, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado17=0 AND nEstado18=0 AND nEstado19=0 AND nEstado20=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
ELSE IF nEstado17=1 AND nEstado18=1 AND nEstado19=1 AND nEstado20=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado17=1 OR nEstado18=1 OR nEstado19=1 OR nEstado20=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
nEstado16=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 12, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado13=1 AND nEstado14=1 AND nEstado15=1 AND nEstado16=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado13=0 AND nEstado14=0 AND nEstado15=0 AND nEstado16=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado13=1 OR nEstado14=1 OR nEstado15=1 OR nEstado16=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
ELSE IF nEstado13=-1 OR nEstado14=-1 OR nEstado15=-1 OR nEstado16=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
Local procedure Verifica_Menu_Almacen
